zh.of Tehidy, Cornwall, England: 英國英格蘭可瓦爾特希迪
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Basset Jr於1441年出生在英國可瓦爾特希迪時，他的父親Sir John Bassett I67歲，母親Johanna Beaumont17歲。他於大約1461年與Elizabeth Budockshyde在英國可瓦爾特希迪結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1485年11月6日在他的家鄉享年44歲，埋葬在英國可瓦爾特希迪。

zh-hans.of Tehidy, Cornwall, England: 英国英格兰可瓦爾特希迪
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Basset Jr于1441年出生在英国可瓦爾特希迪时，他的父亲Sir John Bassett I67岁，母亲Johanna Beaumont17岁。他于大约1461年与Elizabeth Budockshyde在英国可瓦爾特希迪结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1485年11月6日在他的家乡享年44岁，埋葬在英国可瓦爾特希迪。

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Basset Jr was born in 1441, in Tehidy, Cornwall, England, his father, Sir John Bassett I, was 67 and his mother, Johanna Beaumont, was 17. He married Elizabeth Budockshyde about 1461, in Tehidy, Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 6 November 1485, in his hometown, at the age of 44, and was buried in Tehidy, Cornwall, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Basset Jr est né en 1441, à Tehidy, Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Bassett I, avait 67 ans et sa mère, Johanna Beaumont, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Budockshyde environ 1461, à Tehidy, Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 6 novembre 1485, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Tehidy, Cornouailles, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Basset Jr 1441 in Tehidy, Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Bassett I 67 und seine Mutter Johanna Beaumont 17. Er hat um 1461 in Tehidy, Cornwall, England Elizabeth Budockshyde geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 6. November 1485 im Alter von 44 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Tehidy, Cornwall, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Basset Jr è nato il nel 1441 nel Tehidy, Cornwall, England, il suo padre, Sir John Bassett I, aveva 67 anni e il suo madre, Johanna Beaumont, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Budockshyde circa 1461, nel Tehidy, Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 6 novembre 1485, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Tehidy, Cornwall, England.

ja.Tehidy, Cornwall, England: イギリスコルンワルテヒディ
ja.of Tehidy, Cornwall, England: イギリスイギリスコルンワルテヒディ
ja.Chartham, Kent, England: イギリスケントチャーサム
ja.lifeSummary: John Basset Jrが1441年にイギリスコルンワルテヒディで生まれた時，父Sir John Bassett Iは67歳，母Johanna Beaumontは17歳であった。約1461年にイギリスコルンワルテヒディでElizabeth Budockshydeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1485年11月6日に故郷で44歳で死去し，イギリスコルンワルテヒディにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Basset Jr(이)가 1441년 영국 코른월 테히디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Bassett I(은)는 67세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanna Beaumont(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 1461년 영국 코른월 테히디에서 Elizabeth Budockshyde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1485년 11월 6일 그의 고향에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 코른월 테히디에 묻혔다.

mn.of Tehidy, Cornwall, England: Tehidy, Kernev, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Basset Jr nasceu em 1441, em Tehidy, Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Bassett I, tinha 67 anos e sua mãe, Johanna Beaumont, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Budockshyde aproximadamente 1461, em Tehidy, Cornwall, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de novembro de 1485, em sua cidade natal, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Tehidy, Cornwall, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Basset Jr родился в 1441 г. в местности тэиди, корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Bassett I было 67 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna Beaumont, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Budockshyde около 1461 г. в местности тэиди, корнвалл, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 6 ноября 1485 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности тэиди, корнвалл, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Basset Jr nació en 1441, en Tehidy, Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Bassett I, tenía 67 años y su mamá, Johanna Beaumont, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Budockshyde aproximadamente 1461, en Tehidy, Cornwall, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 6 de noviembre de 1485, en su pueblo, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Tehidy, Cornwall, Inglaterra.
